# City2Graph

> City2Graph is a Python library for constructing spatial and heterogeneous
> graphs from buildings, streets, public transport feeds, origin–destination
> matrices, zones, and points of interest. It connects GeoPandas, NetworkX,
> rustworkx, and PyTorch Geometric for spatial network analysis and Graph Neural
> Networks.

City2Graph documentation is written for geospatial developers, data scientists,
and urban, mobility, and transport researchers. The links below point to the
latest documentation.

## Start here

- [Overview](https://city2graph.net/latest/index.html): Capabilities, supported data, workflow guide, quickstart, and frequently asked questions.
- [Installation](https://city2graph.net/latest/installation.html): pip, conda-forge, PyTorch CPU, and supported CUDA installation options.
- [Tutorials](https://city2graph.net/latest/examples/index.html): Task-oriented notebooks and applied projects.
- [Python API reference](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/index.html): Public modules and functions organised by task.

## Tutorials

- [Urban morphology from Overture Maps and OpenStreetMap](https://city2graph.net/latest/examples/morphological_graph_from_overturemaps.html): Build heterogeneous graphs from buildings, tessellations, and streets.
- [GTFS public transport graphs](https://city2graph.net/latest/examples/gtfs.html): Build stop-to-stop travel-time graphs and multimodal isochrones.
- [OD matrices and mobility graphs](https://city2graph.net/latest/examples/generating_graphs_from_od_matrix.html): Convert edge lists and adjacency matrices into weighted spatial graphs.
- [Spatial proximity graphs](https://city2graph.net/latest/examples/generating_graphs_by_proximity.html): Construct KNN, Delaunay, Gilbert, Waxman, and contiguity graphs.
- [Metapaths for heterogeneous GNNs](https://city2graph.net/latest/examples/add_metapaths.html): Add composite typed relations to heterogeneous graphs.

## API modules

- [Graph conversion](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/graph.html): Convert between GeoDataFrames, NetworkX, and PyTorch Geometric.
- [Data](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/data.html): Load Overture Maps data and place boundaries.
- [Morphology](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/morphology.html): Build building, tessellation, and street relations.
- [Transportation](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/transportation.html): Load GTFS or GBFS data and build travel-summary graphs.
- [Mobility](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/mobility.html): Convert origin–destination data to weighted graphs.
- [Proximity](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/proximity.html): Build proximity, contiguity, bridge, grouping, and directed graphs.
- [Metapath](https://city2graph.net/latest/api/metapath.html): Materialise metapath-derived relations.

## Project

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/c2g-dev/city2graph): Source code, issues, releases, and contribution workflow.
- [PyPI package](https://pypi.org/project/city2graph/): Python package releases and installation metadata.
- [Zenodo DOI](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15858845): Citable archive.
- [Citation metadata](https://github.com/c2g-dev/city2graph/blob/main/CITATION.cff): Citation File Format record.
